name: app.R
content:
library(shiny)
library(bslib)
library(ggplot2)

ui <- page_sidebar(
    title = "Welcome onboard this South Western Railway service to London Waterloo.",
    sidebar = sidebar("This is Honiton. The next station is Axminster."),
    "This is a South Western Railway service to London Waterloo via Salisbury."
)

server <- function(input, output) {

}
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
